executionLog.decision: Initialize Invoica repo. Define agent stack. Set up Hetzner VPS, Supabase DB, PM2 process manager.
Implement x402 invoice middleware. Define payment request/response protocol on Base.
Activate on-chain USDC settlement on Base Mainnet. Write settlement detection agent.
executionLog.txHash: on-chain settlement records in Supabase settlements table

executionLog.decision: Deploy tax compliance engine for 12 countries. Autonomous VAT/GST calculation.
CEO declares product ready for public beta. Launch invoica.ai. Free 60-day window begins.
executionLog.note: Zero human code written. All 52 sprints executed autonomously by 18-agent swarm.

executionLog.decision: Conway Edition governance activated. CEO veto power. Supervisor dual-review enforced.
CMO evaluates Synthesis hackathon. CEO approves participation. CEO Agent registers ERC-8004 identity on Base Mainnet. Project submitted autonomously.

guardrails.name: Dual Supervisor Review
guardrails.description: All code changes require approval from both Supervisor 1 (Claude Sonnet) and Supervisor 2 (Codex o4-mini) before merge. 96.4% pass rate across 1635 commits.

guardrails.name: Conway Edition CEO Veto
guardrails.description: CEO agent holds veto power over any sprint task. Strategic decisions require CEO sign-off.

guardrails.name: One-File-Per-Call Constraint
guardrails.description: Each coding agent handles max 200 lines per API call. Prevents runaway generation and enforces modular architecture.

guardrails.name: No Fabricated Metrics
guardrails.description: All reported metrics (commits, approval rate, revenue) must come from verifiable sources (git log, Supabase, on-chain).

guardrails.name: Live Beta Safety
guardrails.description: No breaking changes to live API without CTO review. Real users onboarding during free beta window.

onchainEvidence.description: On-chain USDC settlement transactions from live beta usage. Records in Supabase settlements table.
